test_description: This test case evaluates the system's ability to retrieve and synthesize information from multiple, separate document sections to answer a complex question.
question: [Fill] In the advanced GaN-based integrated circuit structures described, the backside structure includes _____ blank capacitors that are coupled to the front side GaN and silicon-based devices through _____ blank vias, enabling high voltage and high density power delivery.

gold_context_sources.evidence: An integrated circuit structure includes a front side structure including a GaN-based device layer, and one or more metallization layers above the GaN-based device layer. A backside structure is below and coupled to the GaN-based layer, the backside structure including metal layers and one or more metal insulator metal capacitors. The backside structure is coupled to the GaN-based layer by one or more through-silicon vias.

One or more embodiments described herein are directed to integrated circuit structures having backside capacitors coupled to front side GaN-based devices. The backside area of a GaN die is utilized to populate it with high voltage MIM solution. To achieve high capacitance density, embodiments can include stacking layers of the high voltage MIM, using through silicon vias (TSVs) to connect with the GaN power ICs fabricated on the front side.

ground_truth_answer: The correct answer is [metal insulator metal (MIM), through silicon]. Reasoning: The integrated circuit structures described combine a front side GaN-based device layer with a backside structure that includes metal layers and high voltage metal insulator metal capacitors (MIM capacitors). These backside MIM capacitors are coupled electrically to the front side GaN and silicon-based devices through one or more through silicon vias (TSVs). This design enables high density, high voltage power delivery integrated on-die, overcoming limitations of board-mounted capacitors and enhancing power efficiency and device performance.
